description: Rubber material items that drop as loot and reference rubber properties. Tree resins and magically-created elastic materials.

items.name: Tree Resin
items.description: Sticky resin tapped from rubber trees.

items.name: Latex Extract
items.description: Milky fluid extracted from rubber plants.

items.name: Amber
items.description: Fossilized tree resin, hard but flexible when enchanted.

items.name: Living Resin
items.description: Magically animated resin that repairs itself over time.
